name: loss-driven-development
description: LDD — loss-driven development for the AI-era coding loop. Ten portable skills across three optimization loops (inner/code, refinement/deliverable, outer/method): root-cause-by-layer, loss-backprop-lens, reproducibility-first, e2e-driven-iteration, dialectical-reasoning, iterative-refinement, method-evolution, drift-detection, docs-as-definition-of-done, loop-driven-engineering.
